CustomField.formula: IF( LEN( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE(Mobile_Phone__c , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) = 11, MID( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE(Mobile_Phone__c , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") , 2, 10 ), TRIM( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE(Mobile_Phone__c , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) )
CustomField.label: Normalized Mobile Phone
